body.content:
Tokyo Hotels
Tokyo has great hotels in all budget classes. Here I introduce the best Tokyo hotels in each budget class, all personally inspected.
![Traditional-style living area with large sofa and television and big double sleeping area behind in The Ritz-Carlton hotel Tokyo, Japan](https://photos.smugmug.com/photos/i-ScSHKW5/0/LLXTWMZWnxRRpj24RHZ9V4LpZ6qQPXR8J7vx45LGf/L/i-ScSHKW5-L.jpg "Traditional-style living area with large sofa and television and big double sleeping area behind in The Ritz-Carlton hotel Tokyo, Japan")
Ritz-Carlton suite room
## Tokyo Hotel Budget Classes
* Budget: less than ¥20,000 (US$128) per room
* Mid-range: between ¥20,000 (US$128) and ¥50,000 (US$320) per room
* Luxury: over ¥50,000 (US$320) per room
## Quick Hotel Recommendations For Tokyo
Further down this page are my carefully curated Tokyo hotel recommendations for different budgets and styles of hotels. But if just want some quick Tokyo hotel recommendations, try these.
* **Mid-Range:** [Hotel Ryumeikan Tokyo](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [Hotel Century Southern Tower](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/century-southern-tower.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [JR Kyushu Hotel Blossom Shinjuku](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/jr-kyushu-blossom-shinjuku.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels),
* **Luxury:** [Palace Hotel Tokyo](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/palace-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [Mandarin Oriental Tokyo](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mandarin-oriental-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [Tokyo Station Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/tokyo-station.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels),
* **Budget:** [Dormy Inn Akihabara](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/dormy-inn-akihabara.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [Remm Hibiya](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/remm-hibiyia.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [Tokyo Ueno Touganeya Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ueno-touganeya.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels),
* **Families:** [Mimaru Shinjuku West](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mimaru-tokyo-shinjuku-west.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [Hundred Stay Tokyo Shinjuku](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/hundred-stay-tokyo-shinjuku.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [Mimaru Tokyo Ikebukuro](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mimarudong-jing-chi-dai.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels),
* **Honeymoons:** [Mandarin Oriental Tokyo](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mandarin-oriental-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [Ritz-Carlton Tokyo](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-ritz-carlton-tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels), and [The Peninsula Tokyo](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-peninsula-tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-tokyo_hotels).
##

## [Where To Stay in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/)
Tokyo is a sprawling city and each urban node has a different character. Thus, it's very important to stay in a good area. See my [Where to Stay in Tokyo page](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/) for my advice on the best places to stay in Tokyo.
Recommended Budget Tokyo Hotels
[![Compact double room with desk and television in the Dormy Inn Akihabara hotel, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Compact double room with desk and television in the Dormy Inn Akihabara hotel, Tokyo, Japan")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/dormy-inn-akihabara.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-01)[Dormy Inn](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/dormy-inn-akihabara.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-02)Akihabara[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/dormy-inn-akihabara.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-03)
[![A guest room in the Remm Hibuya hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with orange interiors, bed, shower room, and massage chair](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "A guest room in the Remm Hibuya hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with orange interiors, bed, shower room, and massage chair")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/remm-hibiyia.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-04)[Remm Hibuya](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/remm-hibiyia.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-05)Ginza[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/remm-hibiyia.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-06)
[![Twin beds in a Touganeya Hotel double room, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Twin beds in a Touganeya Hotel double room, Tokyo, Japan")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ueno-touganeya.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-07)[Touganeya Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ueno-touganeya.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-08)Ueno[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ueno-touganeya.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-09)
[![Double bed with overhead single bunk in a Super Hotel Asakusa triple room, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Double bed with overhead single bunk in a Super Hotel Asakusa triple room, Tokyo, Japan")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/super-asakusa.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-10)[Super Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/super-asakusa.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-11)Asakusa[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/super-asakusa.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTBudgetTokyoHotels-12)
## [Best Budget Hotels in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-budget-hotels/)
You may be surprised to find out that you can get a perfectly acceptable room in Tokyo for less than ¥20,000 (around US$128). See my [Best Tokyo Budget Hotels page](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-budget-hotels/) for for our top picks.
Recommended Mid Range Tokyo Hotels
[![Hotel Ryumeikan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-01)[Hotel Ryumeikan](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-02)Tokyo Station[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-03)
[![Kyushu Blossom](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/jr-kyushu-blossom-shinjuku.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-04)[Kyushu Blossom](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/jr-kyushu-blossom-shinjuku.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-05)Shinjuku[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/jr-kyushu-blossom-shinjuku.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-06)
[![Marunouchi Hotel](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/marunouchi-hotel.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-07)[Marunouchi Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/marunouchi-hotel.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-08)Tokyo Station[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/marunouchi-hotel.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-09)
[![Century Southern Tower](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/century-southern-tower.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-10)[Century Southern](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/century-southern-tower.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-11)Shinjuku[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/century-southern-tower.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTMidRangeTokyoHotelGrid-12)
## [Best Mid-Range and Business Hotels in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-mid-range-and-business-hotels/)
The mid-range, between ¥20,000 (US$128) and ¥50,000 (US$320) per room, is where you'll find the best values in Tokyo hotels. Hotels in this range will often approach the quality of luxury hotels in other parts of the world. See [Best Tokyo Mid-Range and Business Hotels page](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-mid-range-and-business-hotels/) for for our top picks.
Recommended Luxury Hotels In Tokyo
[![Mandarin Oriental](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mandarin-oriental-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-01)[Mandarin Oriental](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mandarin-oriental-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-02)Tokyo Station[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mandarin-oriental-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-03)
[![The Peninsula](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-peninsula-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-04)[The Peninsula](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-peninsula-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-05)Tokyo Station[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-peninsula-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-06)
[![Ritz-Carlton](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-ritz-carlton-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-07)[Ritz-Carlton](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-ritz-carlton-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-08)Roppongi[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-ritz-carlton-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-09)
[![Conrad Tokyo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E)](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/conrad-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-10)[Conrad Tokyo](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/conrad-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-11)Shiodome[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/conrad-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TTLuxuryTokyoHotelsGrid-12)
## [Best Luxury Hotels in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-luxury-hotels/)
Tokyo has a superb collection of luxury hotels (over ¥50,000 or around US$320 per room). See [Best Tokyo Luxury Hotels page](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-luxury-hotels/) for our top picks in the luxury bracket.
Recommended Boutique Tokyo Hotels
[![Traditional Japanese elements with sofa and large twin beds in the Hotel Ryumeikan Ochanomizu Honten, Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Traditional Japanese elements with sofa and large twin beds in the Hotel Ryumeikan Ochanomizu Honten, Tokyo, Japan")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-ochanomizu-honten.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-01)[Hotel Ryumeikan](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-ochanomizu-honten.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-02)Ochanomizu[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-ochanomizu-honten.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-03)
[![Living area with sofas and desk of the Four Seasons deluxe one-bedroom suite in Tokyo, Japan](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Living area with sofas and desk of the Four Seasons deluxe one-bedroom suite in Tokyo, Japan")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/four-seasons-tokyo-at-marunouchi.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-04)[Four Seasons](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/four-seasons-tokyo-at-marunouchi.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-05)Marunouchi[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/four-seasons-tokyo-at-marunouchi.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-06)
[![The sofas, easy chairs, and umbrellas on the rooftop outdoor lounge in the Hotel Indigo Tokyo Shibuya on a sunny day](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "The sofas, easy chairs, and umbrellas on the rooftop outdoor lounge in the Hotel Indigo Tokyo Shibuya on a sunny day")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/indigo-tokyo-shibuya-an-ihg.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-07)[Hotel Indigo](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/indigo-tokyo-shibuya-an-ihg.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-08)Shibuya[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/indigo-tokyo-shibuya-an-ihg.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-09)
[![Green and wooden interior of a corner twin suite in the Aoyama Grand hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with city views outside](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Green and wooden interior of a corner twin suite in the Aoyama Grand hotel, Tokyo, Japan, with city views outside")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-aoyama-grand.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-10)[Aoyama Grand](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-aoyama-grand.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-11)Aoyama[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-aoyama-grand.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-BoutiqueTokyoHotels-12)
## [Best Boutique Hotels in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-boutique-hotels/)
There are some amazing boutique hotels in Tokyo. See our[Best Boutique Hotels in Tokyo page](https://trulytokyo.com/best-tokyo-boutique-hotels/)for our top picks.
Recommended Small Tokyo Hotels
[![Twin beds and comfortable lounge chair in a guest room in Tokyo’s Ryumeikan Hotel](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Twin beds and comfortable lounge chair in a guest room in Tokyo’s Ryumeikan Hotel")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-01)[Ryumeikan Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-02)Tokyo Station[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/ryumeikan-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-03)
[![Big comfortable twin beds in a corner room of Tokyo’s Marunouchi Hotel with a nighttime view of the city](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Big comfortable twin beds in a corner room of Tokyo’s Marunouchi Hotel with a nighttime view of the city")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/marunouchi-hotel.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-04)[Marunouchi Hotel](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/marunouchi-hotel.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-05)Tokyo Station[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/marunouchi-hotel.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-06)
[![A range of different seating options in the atmospherically lit lobby of The Lively Azabujuban hotel in Tokyo](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "A range of different seating options in the atmospherically lit lobby of The Lively Azabujuban hotel in Tokyo")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-lively-azabujuban-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-07)[The Lively](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-lively-azabujuban-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-08)Azabujuban[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/the-lively-azabujuban-tokyo.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-09)
[![View of a twin room and bathroom in Tokyo’s Hotel MyStays Hamamatsucho](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "View of a twin room and bathroom in Tokyo’s Hotel MyStays Hamamatsucho")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mystays-hamamatsucho.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-10)[Hotel MyStays](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mystays-hamamatsucho.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-11)Hamamatsucho[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mystays-hamamatsucho.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-SmallTokyoHotels-12)
## [Best Small Hotels in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/best-small-hotels-in-tokyo/)
There are some great little hotels in Tokyo. See our [Best Small Hotels in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/best-small-hotels-in-tokyo/) for our favorites.
Recommended Family Tokyo Hotels
[![Mimaru Shinjuku West hotel in Tokyo family room with two sets of twin beds and wooden bunk beds](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20width='auto'%20height='auto'%20viewBox='0%200%20auto%20auto'%3E%3C/svg%3E "Mimaru Shinjuku West hotel in Tokyo family room with two sets of twin beds and wooden bunk beds")](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mimaru-tokyo-shinjuku-west.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-FamilyTokyoHotels-01)[Mimaru Shinjuku](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mimaru-tokyo-shinjuku-west.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-FamilyTokyoHotels-02)Shinjuku[More Info](https://www.booking.com/hotel/jp/mimaru-tokyo-shinjuku-west.en-gb.html?aid=965264;label=TT-FamilyTokyoHotels-03)

## [Best Capsule Hotels in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/best-capsule-hotels-in-tokyo/)
Staying a night in a capsule hotel is the quintessential “only in Japan” experience. For our recommendations check out our [Best Capsule Hotels in Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/best-capsule-hotels-in-tokyo/).
You can also check current Tokyo hotel availability and pricing at [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/city/jp/tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Tokyo-hotels) and [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?cid=1741664&pcs=1&city=5085&tag=TT-Tokyo-hotels).
### Tokyo Vacation Checklist
* [ESSENTIALS](https://trulytokyo.com/first-time-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-01) – For all the essentials in a brief overview, see my [First Time In Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/first-time-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-02) guide
* [HOTELS](https://www.booking.com/city/jp/tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Checklist-03) – Check Tokyo accommodation availability and pricing on [Booking.com](https://www.booking.com/city/jp/tokyo.html?aid=965264;label=TT-Checklist-04) and [Agoda.com](https://www.agoda.com/partners/partnersearch.aspx?pcs=1&cid=1743457&city=5085&tag=TT-Checklist-05) - often you can book with no upfront payment and free cancellation
* [WHERE TO STAY](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-06) – Need tips on where to stay? See my one page guide [Where To Stay In Tokyo](https://trulytokyo.com/where-to-stay-in-tokyo/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-07)
* [BULLET TRAIN](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/en-US/rails-32/1012-japan/) – You can buy [shinkansen (bullet train) tickets online](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/en-US/rails-32/1012-japan/) from Klook - popular routes include [Tokyo to Kyoto](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1305/tokyo-to-kyoto-trains/), [Tokyo to Osaka](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1304/tokyo-to-shin-osaka-trains/) and [Tokyo to Hiroshima](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=827006&k_site=https://www.klook.com/rails-32/1012-japan/route-1310/tokyo-to-hiroshima-trains/)
* [SIM CARDS](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=877200&k_site=https://www.klook.com/search/result/?query=japan%20esim) – You can [buy an eSim](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=2652&aff_adid=877200&k_site=https://www.klook.com/search/result/?query=japan%20esim) to activate in Japan or [buy a Japan SIM card online](<https://www.getyourguide.com/s/?q=tokyo sim&searchSource=8&partner_id=LAMDN2W&utm_medium=online_publisher&placement=content-middle&cmp=TT-Checklist-08>) for collection on arrival at Tokyo Narita or Haneda airports. Or rent an [unlimited data pocket wifi router](<https://www.getyourguide.com/s/?q=japan wifi&searchSource=7&partner_id=LAMDN2W&utm_medium=online_publisher&placement=content-middle&cmp=TT-Checklist-09>)
* [PACKING LIST](https://insideosaka.com/packing-list-for-japan/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-10) – See my comprehensive [Packing List For Japan](https://insideosaka.com/packing-list-for-japan/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-11)
* [FLIGHTS](https://www.skyscanner.net/g/referrals/v1/flights/cheap-flights-to?adId=1100662&campaignId=13416&destination=tyoa&mediaPartnerId=1924024) – Compare airline flight prices and timings for [the best Japan flight deals](https://www.skyscanner.net/g/referrals/v1/flights/cheap-flights-to?adId=1100662&campaignId=13416&destination=tyoa&mediaPartnerId=1924024). Check my guides to [arriving at Narita Airport](https://trulytokyo.com/arriving-at-tokyos-narita-international-airport/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-12) and [at Haneda Airport](https://trulytokyo.com/arriving-at-tokyo-haneda-international-airport/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-13).
* [JAPAN RAIL PASS](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=1591&aff_adid=616549&k_site=https://www.klook.com/activity/1420-7-day-whole-japan-rail-pass-jr-pass/) – If you're visiting more than one city, you might save money with a [Japan Rail Pass](https://affiliate.klook.com/redirect?aid=1591&aff_adid=616549&k_site=https://www.klook.com/activity/1420-7-day-whole-japan-rail-pass-jr-pass/) – see if [it's worth it](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-rail-pass-how-to-get-it/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-14) for you
* [TRAVEL INSURANCE](https://www.tkqlhce.com/click-7919142-15371527) – [World Nomads](https://www.tkqlhce.com/click-7919142-15371527) offers simple and flexible travel insurance. Buy at home or while traveling and claim online from anywhere in the world
* [WANT HELP?](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-travel-consulting/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-15) – Do you want help planning your trip? Chris Rowthorn and his team of Japan experts at [Japan Travel Consulting](https://trulytokyo.com/japan-travel-consulting/?utm_source=checkbox&utm_medium=link&utm_campaign=TT-Checklist-16) can help
